title: prunella vulgaris var. violacea
intro: Prunella vulgaris var. violacea, also known as self-heal or violet self-heal, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the mint family and is native to Europe, Asia, and North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Prunella vulgaris var. violacea include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory tract infections, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Prunella vulgaris var. violacea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
